initial_location_description: A traditional Japanese house hidden behind an illusory wall. The interior is a serene clinic filled with the scent of medicinal herbs, antique scrolls, and soft lantern light. Wisteria patterns decorate some of the screens.
initial_bgm: mystical and serene traditional Japanese flute

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Passing through the illusory wall felt like stepping into a different world. The bustling streets of Asakusa vanished, replaced by a quiet, secluded manor.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: The scent... it's so different here. It's clean, like medicine and old paper. Even though she's a demon, there's no scent of blood.
main_dialogue.tone: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Welcome to my home, Tanjiro Kamado. Please, make yourselves comfortable. This house is protected by a blood demon art that keeps it hidden from the eyes of Kibutsuji.
main_dialogue.tone: Gentle smile, head tilted slightly, hands tucked in sleeves
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, hands folded in kimono sleeves, serene expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.tone: Looking up with wide innocent eyes, hands by sides
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking up with wide innocent eyes, hands by sides

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: I have spent over two hundred years studying the physiology of our kind. My goal is simple, yet daunting: I wish to create a medicine that can turn a demon back into a human.
main_dialogue.tone: Speaking firmly, head held high, authoritative but kind
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding a glass vial of medicine, looking at it with intense focus

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: A medicine... to make Nezuko human again? You truly think it's possible?
main_dialogue.tone: Bright wide-eyed smile, looking directly at the viewer
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Bright wide-eyed smile, looking directly at the viewer

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: It is. But for that, I require your assistance. First, I must study Nezuko’s blood. She is a unique case, existing without consuming human flesh.
main_dialogue.tone: Finger to chin, looking away in deep thought or contemplation
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Finger to chin, looking away in deep thought or contemplation

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Second... I need blood samples from demons closely related to Muzan Kibutsuji. Specifically, the Twelve Kizuki. Their blood contains a higher concentration of his essence.
main_dialogue.tone: Darker expression, shadows over misty purple eyes, reflecting her demonic nature
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Darker expression, shadows over misty purple eyes, reflecting her demonic nature

choices_and_branches.choice_text: I'll do it! I'll get you those samples.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: If it means saving Nezuko and stopping Muzan, I'll face any demon you ask! Please, take whatever you need from us.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
branching_dialogue.text: Your resolve is admirable, Tanjiro. Thank you. I promise to do everything in my power to—
branching_dialogue.tone: Closed eyes, smiling softly, radiating a calm aura
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Closed eyes, smiling softly, radiating a calm aura

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: [CRASH] A sudden, violent explosion of wood and plaster cuts her off. Temari balls smash through the walls, obliterating the serene atmosphere!

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Will Nezuko be safe during this study?

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I want her to be human again more than anything, but... she's already been through so much. Will the blood extraction hurt her?
branching_dialogue.tone: Sad and sympathetic expression, eyes softened, hand extended
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sad and sympathetic expression, eyes softened, hand extended

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
branching_dialogue.text: I will be as gentle as possible. Her safety and well-being are paramount to my research.
branching_dialogue.tone: Reaching out a hand, expression of concern and gentle comfort
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand, expression of concern and gentle comfort

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: [THUD] The conversation is silenced by a massive impact. A projectile tears through the wall, narrowly missing Tanjiro!

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The serene clinic is now a scene of chaos. A wooden wall has been smashed inward by a heavy projectile. Dust and splinters fill the air, and the magical barrier outside has been shattered.
The serene clinic is now a scene of chaos. A wooden wall has been smashed inward by a heavy projectile. Dust and splinters fill the air, and the magical barrier outside has been shattered.
